defs: A flowerless plant which forms a true fruit as the result of fertilization, as the red seaweeds, the Ascomycetes, etc.
notes: ☞ The division of algæ and fungi into four classes called Carpophytes, Oophytes, Protophytes, and Zygophytes (or Carposporeæ, Oosporeæ, Protophyta, and Zygosporeæ) was proposed by Sachs about 1875.
